title: Combat Timer
description: Simple Anti-Combat logger. Compatible with utilities
body:
**What does this do?**
**Features:**

1. **Combat Timer Mechanism:** Once tagged in combat, players are unable to log off or disconnect from the server for a specified duration. This also prevents Homeward Bound's /home, /spawn and /back commands.

2. **Customizable Timer Settings:** You can adjust the cooldown period, change warning message contents, and allow or disallow friendly fire (punching).

_
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**What is 'friendly-fire'**
Friendly fire in this case is when a player punches another player with their fist. In such cases, you have to option to not count it as combat in the config.

</details>

_

*Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.20.1+, compatible with [Homeward Bound](https://modrinth.com/mod/homeward-bound/)*
